Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Oh, are you interested in these Max Safety Shoes?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}You have good taste! I can sell them to you for a reasonable price.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Woohoo, lucky me! ...Er, by which I mean, "Lucky us"! Especially you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Well then, these Max Safety Shoes are all yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Woohoo, lucky me! ...Wait, you ain't got enough money...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Listen, I can't lower the price any more. If you want 'em, you gotta have the money for 'em.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}If you don't need nothin', then get outta here. I'm a busy man![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Still need something? Sorry, kid, but I'm busy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 431}Hm, you need something? I'm busy getting ready to sell shoes.[n]{f 1 1}
